title: Senior Plant Manager at Jain Irrigation

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Jain Irrigation
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Jain Irrigation in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Jain Irrigation:
Jain Irrigation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jain Irrigation!
